name: Reishi (Ganoderma lucidum)
title: Reishi (Ganoderma lucidum) | The Hippie Scientist
description: Reishi (Ganoderma lucidum) is a medicinal mushroom used across East Asian traditions for immune regulation and adaptogenic support. Its beta-glucan polysaccharides and triterpenes (ganoderic acids) modulate innate and adaptive immunity, NK cell activity, and inflammatory signaling. Clinical evidence supports immunomodulatory effects; sleep and fatigue data are emerging.

name: Schisandra (Schisandra chinensis)
title: Schisandra (Schisandra chinensis) | The Hippie Scientist
description: Schisandra (Schisandra chinensis) is a five-flavor berry used in TCM as an adaptogen and liver tonic. Its primary lignans (schisandrin A/B/C) support hepatocyte detoxification via CYP450 modulation and exhibit antioxidant activity. Human data support mild stress reduction and liver enzyme normalization in hepatitis populations.
